flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Labette Community College fell 43% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 801).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 42% at Labette Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (766 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Labette Community College rose 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.6k → $10.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Labette Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.5k → $4.1k).
